arabic: عن أنس رضى الله عنه أن رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم كان يتنفس في الشراب ثلاثاً‏.‏((متفق عليه))

english.narrator: Anas (May Allah be pleased with him) reported:
english.text:
The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) used to breathe three times in the course of a drink (he used to drink in three gulps).

.

chapter.english: The Book About the Etiquette of Eating
